description_long: This object is a single, whole lemon with a slightly irregular, rounded shape and a subtly faceted surface. Its peel displays a gradient of yellow to light brown hues, with some areas appearing more matte and others showing a glossy sheen from reflected light. The surface is mostly smooth but exhibits minor textural variations, including faint dimples and a few small marks. There are no visible stickers, labels, or signs of peeling, and the peel appears largely intact. The coloration is uneven, with some darker patches and a pale, almost whitish area near the base. No other objects or urban context are visible around the lemon, and it is presented in isolation.
description: A whole, slightly irregular lemon with a smooth, glossy yellow-brown peel and minor surface marks, shown in isolation.
description_view_0: This view highlights a pale, whitish patch on the lower side of the lemon, with a smooth, slightly glossy surface and subtle dimpling.
description_view_1: This angle shows a darker, more uniformly brownish-yellow area with a glossy highlight and faint surface marks.
description_view_2: The lemon appears rounder and more uniformly colored in this view, with a rich yellow-brown tone and a glossy finish.
description_view_3: This side displays a lighter yellow surface with a small visible mark and a smooth, slightly faceted texture.
attribute_peel_condition: The peel is mostly smooth and intact with minor dimples and a few small marks, showing no signs of peeling or significant cracks.
